The '''positive''' mood is the unmarked, base form in Aelaki. It requires no special morphological marking.

== Overview ==

The positive mood represents the default, affirmative state of a word. Any word that does not carry the [[Negative]] /f/-infix or another mood suffix is understood to be in the positive mood.

Because it is the unmarked form, the positive mood is the citation form of verbs, [[Adjective|adjectives]], and [[Adverb|adverbs]].

== Contrast with Negative ==

{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Positive !! Negative !! Gloss
|-
| ''koran'' || ''korfan'' || "bright" / "not bright"
|-
| ''zadate'' || ''zafdafte'' || "lengthy" / "not lengthy"
|}

[[Category:Adjective things]]
[[Category:git synced pages]]
